name: Ability Score and Modifier
definition: A creature has six ability scores—Strength, Dexterity, Constitution, Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma—each of which has a corresponding modifier.
full_text: A creature has six ability scores—Strength, Dexterity, Constitution, Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma—each of which has a corresponding modifier. Add the modifier when you make a D20 Test with the corresponding ability or when a rule asks you to do so.
usage: Add the modifier when you make a D20 Test with the corresponding ability or when a rule asks you to do so.
